coordinator_error.message: Gate 2 approval recorded locally after operator approval.

payload.summary: Gate 2 approved for vendor-neutral-autopilot. The operator approved proceeding with implementation and noted that Gemini model names were changed to match the latest models available via the API.
completed_work: Recorded the operator note about latest Gemini API model names.

decisions.title: Gate 2 approved
decisions.rationale: The operator selected approval option 1, so the plan is ready for /implement-feature vendor-neutral-autopilot.

decisions.title: Preserve latest Gemini API model names
decisions.rationale: The operator updated Gemini model names in the design to match the latest models available via the API; implementation should preserve those configured model IDs unless a later source check proves they changed again.

next_steps: Implementation should preserve the Gemini model names currently recorded in design.md unless a later source check proves they changed again.

relevant_files.description: Provider model mapping design with updated Gemini names
